changeSet.author: openelis-mntd

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title = 'Malaria and Neglected Tropical Disease (MNTD) Laboratory' AND is_template = true

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.notebook_page np JOIN clinlims.notebook n ON np.notebook_id = n.id WHERE n.title = 'Malaria and Neglected Tropical Disease (MNTD) Laboratory' AND n.is_template = true AND np.page_order = 11

changeSet.comment: Create Environmental Monitoring page for MNTD Laboratory notebook

column.name: instructions
column.value: Record temperature and environmental monitoring data for laboratory compliance. Log device/equipment temperatures with AM/PM checks. View historical temperature logs for this notebook entry. Out-of-range temperatures will be flagged automatically.

column.name: content
notebook_id
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title = 'Malaria and Neglected Tropical Disease (MNTD) Laboratory' AND is_template = true)

delete.where: notebook_id = (SELECT id FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title = 'Malaria and Neglected Tropical Disease (MNTD) Laboratory' AND is_template = true) AND page_order = 11

changeSet.author: openelis-mntd

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.workflow_page_template WHERE workflow_category = 'MNTD' AND display_order = 11

changeSet.comment: Insert MNTD Environmental Monitoring workflow page template

column.name: description
column.value: Record and view temperature logs for laboratory environmental compliance

column.name: default_instructions
column.value: Log device temperatures with AM/PM checks. View historical temperature logs. Out-of-range readings are flagged automatically.

column.name: default_content
column.value: Environmental Monitoring - Temperature logging and compliance tracking
